title: NEET Dress Code 2026: Rules for Female & Male Candidates (3 May Exam)
excerpt: NEET 2026 will be held on 3 May. Check the latest NTA dress code rules for male and female candidates, allowed clothing, prohibited items, customary dress rules, and important exam day guidelines.

seo.metaTitle: NEET Dress Code 2026 – Rules for Male & Female Candidates | Exam Day Guidelines
seo.metaDescription: Check the latest NEET Dress Code 2026 rules for male and female candidates. Know allowed clothes, prohibited items, customary dress rules, and exam day instructions.
keywords: neet dress code for female candidates
neet dress code for male candidates
can we wear jeans in neet 2026
neet exam dress rules for girls
neet exam dress rules for boys

content.text: NEET Dress Code 2026

NEET 2026 is scheduled to be held on 3 May. Candidates appearing for the examination must strictly follow the official dress code issued by NTA to avoid delays, additional frisking, or entry issues at the exam centre.

The NEET Dress Code 2026 is designed to maintain fairness, transparency, and security during the examination. Candidates are advised to wear simple clothes, avoid metal accessories, and carry only permitted items.
What is NEET UG Dress Code 2026?

The National Testing Agency (NTA) prescribes a dress code for NEET candidates to ensure a smooth examination process. Students should avoid clothing with heavy embroidery, multiple pockets, or metallic accessories.
Latest NEET 2026 Dress Code Update

According to the latest update, full-sleeve clothes and woollens are allowed, but candidates must report early for frisking. Religious articles are also permitted after proper verification. Transparent water bottles are allowed inside the exam centre.
NEET Dress Code for Male Candidates 2026
Male candidates should wear simple and light clothing during the exam. Heavy layers, jackets, metallic accessories, and thick footwear should be avoided.
Permitted clothing includes half-sleeve shirts, plain T-shirts, light trousers, and slippers with thin soles. Full sleeves are allowed with early reporting for security checks.
Items Not Allowed for Male Candidates
Male candidates should avoid thick shoes, belts, watches, caps, layered clothing, jackets, and outfits with hidden pockets or metallic buttons.
NEET Dress Code for Female Candidates 2026
Female candidates should wear simple and comfortable clothes for the exam. Light kurtis, tops, leggings, or trousers are generally allowed. Heavy embroidery and decorative clothing should be avoided.
Full-sleeve dresses are allowed with early reporting. Religious or customary dress is permitted after declaration and frisking.
Items Not Allowed for Female Candidates
Female candidates should avoid jewelry, heavy accessories, high heels, boots, decorative hair clips, metallic items, and heavily layered clothing.
Can You Wear Jeans in NEET 2026?
Yes, jeans are allowed if they are simple and do not contain multiple pockets, large metallic buttons, or heavy zips. Avoid designer or tight-fitting jeans.
Are Leggings, Kurtis & T-Shirts Allowed in NEET?
Yes, candidates may wear plain leggings, kurtis, and T-shirts. Clothing should remain simple, lightweight, and comfortable for frisking.
Are Pocket Pants Allowed in NEET 2026?
No, pants with multiple or hidden pockets are not recommended. Candidates should wear simple trousers or lowers without extra pockets.
NEET Customary Dress Code 2026

Candidates wearing customary or religious attire such as a turban or burqa are allowed to appear in the exam. They must declare this during the application process and report early for security checks.
Prohibited Items Inside NEET Exam Hall

Electronic devices such as mobile phones, calculators, Bluetooth devices, smartwatches, earphones, and cameras are strictly prohibited. Bags, wallets, jewelry, belts, study materials, and food items are also not allowed.
Important Guidelines for NEET Dress Code 2026
Candidates should wear simple clothing, avoid accessories, carry only permitted items, and reach the examination centre early to complete verification smoothly.
Last-Minute Dress Code Tips for NEET 2026
Choose simple clothing, avoid heavy accessories, wear comfortable slippers, carry your admit card and ID proof, and arrive early to avoid unnecessary stress on exam day.
NEET Admit Card & Dress Code Rules
Candidates must carry their NEET admit card along with valid ID proof. Following both admit card instructions and dress code guidelines is necessary for smooth entry into the exam centre.

content.question: Can I wear full sleeves in NEET 2026?
content.answer: Yes, full sleeves are allowed in NEET 2026, but candidates should report early for frisking and security checks.

content.question: Are jeans allowed in NEET 2026?
content.answer: Yes, simple jeans are allowed if they do not have multiple pockets, heavy metal buttons, or thick zips.

content.question: Can female candidates wear jewelry during NEET 2026?
content.answer: No, jewelry such as earrings, rings, necklaces, bangles, and bracelets should be avoided inside the examination centre.

content.question: Is a transparent water bottle allowed in NEET 2026?
content.answer: Yes, transparent water bottles are allowed inside the examination centre.

content.text: NEET 2026 Answer Key Code 11 (Saharanpur)
The NEET 2026 examination was successfully conducted on 3 May 2026. Students from Saharanpur and across India who appeared for Code 1 can now check the complete answer key and solutions here.
This answer key will help you match your responses, estimate your score, and get an early idea of your performance before the official results are announced.
📌 NEET Code 1 Answer Key (Image Section)
📥 Download NEET 2026 Answer Key Code 11 PDF
How to Calculate Your NEET Score
To calculate your NEET 2026 score using the answer key, follow the official marking scheme. Add marks for correct answers and subtract marks for incorrect ones.
For every correct answer, you get +4 marks. For every wrong answer, -1 mark is deducted. Questions not attempted will give 0 marks.
Why This Answer Key is Important
The answer key helps students reduce anxiety and get clarity about their expected results. It also allows you to plan your next steps, such as counseling preparation or drop decision.
NEET 2026 Code 11 Analysis
Based on student feedback, the NEET 2026 paper was moderate in difficulty. Biology was easier compared to Physics and Chemistry. Students who maintained accuracy are expected to score well.
Important Tips for Students
Do not rely on a single answer key. Compare multiple sources for better accuracy. Always wait for the official answer key released by the exam authority for final confirmation.
NEET Answer Key 2026 Live Updates
We will keep updating this page with the latest answer key versions, corrections, and official releases. Stay connected and refresh this page regularly.
